ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "hour" TEXT /* Time the tweet was posted (in HH:MM format) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "tweet_content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "favs" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) the tweet received */,
  "rts" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location from where the tweet was posted */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location from where the tweet was posted */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the tweet was posted */,
  "place_as_appears_on_bio" TEXT /* Place as mentioned in the user's bio */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "listed" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has been listed */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet (ISO 639-1 code) */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL to the tweet */,
  "is_rt" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "original_tweet_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original user if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "user_mentions" TEXT /* User mentions in the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "symbols" TEXT /* Stock symbols mentioned in the tweet */,
  "media" TEXT /* Media URLs attached to the tweet */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs linked in the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the tweet */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Financial topic categorization of the tweet */,
  "processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was processed by the system */,
  "isverified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified on Twitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_original_tweet_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_tweet_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "listed" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has been listed */,
  "user_language" TEXT /* Language of the user (ISO 639-1 code) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., influencer, analyst, enthusiast) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified on Twitter */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined Twitter */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current stock price */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the hashtag (number of times used) */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was last used */,
  "related_topics" TEXT /* Topics related to the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the mention occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_stocks" (
  "tweet_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tweet-stock relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock mentioned */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Context in which the stock was mentioned (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_stocks_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tweet-hashtag relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag used */,
  "hashtag_context" TEXT /* Context in which the hashtag was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the media */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the media is attached */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of the media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_size" TEXT /* Size of the media file */,
  "media_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media (for videos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the URL */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the URL is linked */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL linked in the tweet */,
  "url_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
